---
title: "Setting Up A New Hub"
sidebarTitle: "New Hub Setup"
description: "The processes that must be completed by the Development and Operations teams when launching a new FKL hub."
---

## Overview

When a new hub needs to be launched, there are various processes that must be completed across the platforms used by FKL. Some of these are for the **Development Team** and some are for the **Operations Team**.

---

## Development Team

| Process | SOP | Duration |
|--|--|--|
| Request new seller with Vivenu | Coming soon | 2 weeks |
| Configure seller domain (DNS) | [Seller Domain SOP](/software/third-party/vivenu/hub-deployment/development/configure-seller-domain) | TBC |
| Configure email domain (DNS) | Coming soon | TBC |
| Configure Webhooks + API key | Coming soon | TBC |
| Configure new hub region | Coming soon | TBC |
| Arrange Vivenu configuration of redirection from shop URL to our website | Coming soon | TBC |
| Configure TalentID/API integration | Coming soon | TBC |
| Configure Telemetry regions | Coming soon | TBC |
| Integrate Google Analytics TAG ID with new hub region website | Coming soon | TBC |

---

## Deployment Team

| Process | SOP |
|--|--|
| Configure the payment gateway | [Gateway SOP](/software/third-party/vivenu/hub-deployment/vivenu-setting-up-a-payment-gateway) | 30 mins |
| Configure the payment strategies | Coming soon | TBC |
| Populate the legal information | Coming soon | TBC |
| Configure the email template | Coming soon | TBC |
| Configure the events configurations | Coming soon | TBC |
| Configure a new landing page for redirecting the customer | Coming soon | TBC |
| Configure Google Analytics / Tag Manager | Coming soon | TBC |
